message:
⚡ Instant card rendering — eliminate 8s skeleton delay + fix navigation blocking (#926)

* ⚡ Instant card rendering — eliminate 8s skeleton delay + fix navigation blocking

Cards now render their actual UI immediately on page load, regardless of cache,
demo mode, or data availability. Data fills in progressively as it arrives.

Changes:
- CardWrapper: Remove data-loading skeleton — only keep mode-switching skeleton
- CardWrapper: Remove offline agent skeleton forcing — cards handle own empty state
- Dashboard: Always background-refresh (localCards pre-populated from defaults)
- Dashboard: Start isLoading=false (never block card grid)
- Layout: Add key={pathname} to Suspense to force reset on route change,
  fixing navigation blocking where old dashboard stayed visible
- shared.ts: Reduce agent timeout 3s→1.5s for faster data pipeline

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix white flash on initial page load

Set dark background (#0a0a0a) directly on <html> element in index.html
so the page is dark from the very first paint, before CSS/JS loads.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🌱 Update perf test results after instant card rendering changes

79/79 tests pass. Demo avg: 808ms (-14%), Live avg: 843ms, Live+cache: 835ms.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
